title: andira unifoliolata
intro: Andira unifoliolata, also known as the "Cordia" or "Jagua", is a plant species that belongs to the Bignoniaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Andira unifoliolata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve the use of its leaves, roots, or bark, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
